title: nepeta prostrata
intro: Nepeta prostrata, also known as creeping catmint, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant that belongs to the mint family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Nepeta prostrata include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
